goal: Remove docs_for_ai internal launch materials before public release

summary.title: Remove docs_for_ai from current public tree
summary.what: Deleted the tracked docs_for_ai directory and removed remaining current-tree references that pointed at it.
summary.why: The directory contained internal planning, dogfood, and agent-facing launch materials that should not appear in the public-facing source tree for the launch PR.
summary.user_goal: Remove docs_for_ai and open a PR without performing history rewrite.

decisions.chose: Delete docs_for_ai from HEAD and clean current references only.
decisions.rationale: The user decided history rewrite was too costly for this launch path, so this PR focuses on making the current tree clean while preserving existing git history.

decisions.chose: Move eval multi-run output references to docs/eval-runs.
decisions.rationale: The repository already ignores docs/eval-runs, and keeping generated eval artifacts under docs_for_ai would recreate the removed directory.

decisions.chose: Replace obsolete spec-path comments with self-contained comments.
decisions.rationale: Code comments should not link to deleted internal specs; the relevant behavior remains understandable without private planning docs.

rejected.reason: The user explicitly chose not to take on the history rewrite flow for this PR.

anti_patterns.what: Reintroducing docs_for_ai as a tracked public-tree directory or generated-output destination.
anti_patterns.why: This directory name now represents internal launch/planning material that was intentionally removed from the public-facing tree; generated eval outputs should stay under docs/eval-runs or another explicit generated-artifact path.

review_notes: This PR does not erase docs_for_ai from git history, old tags, releases, PR comments, or any already-cloned copies.
Validation used: rg docs_for_ai, find docs_for_ai, git diff --check, and ./scripts/hygiene-check.sh. Go make test was intentionally not run per repository guidance.

architectural_claims: docs_for_ai is no longer part of the current source tree or README structure.
Current code comments no longer depend on deleted internal spec documents for basic comprehension.
behavioral_changes: scripts/eval-multi-run.sh now writes generated runs under docs/eval-runs/<timestamp> instead of docs_for_ai/eval-runs/<timestamp>.
security_implications: Removes internal planning material from the current public-facing tree but does not purge historical git objects or GitHub discussion surfaces.
migration_notes: Existing local docs_for_ai/eval-runs artifacts, if any, are not migrated by this change.
